title: × laeliocattleya digbyana-mossiae
intro: × laeliocattleya digbyana-mossiae is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Cattleya and Laelia orchid species. It is also known as the 'Mossie' orchid due to its unique flower structure, characterized by long, white, fragrant flowers with a reddish-purple lip. While the medicinal properties of × laeliocattleya digbyana-mossiae are not extensively documented, its extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. However, its primary use lies in its ornamental value, with herbal preparations such as teas and infusions being made from its flowers for their fragrance and potential health benefits.
